events.content: Accepted PR 33 cancellation review findings: Accepted PR 33 cancellation review findings

raw.question: Accepted PR 33 cancellation review findings
raw.reasoning: The runner must not spawn a harness after an already-aborted signal, and timeout must complete even when a harness ignores SIGTERM; both paths now have fake-harness regression tests.

retrospective.summary: Addressed both PR 33 automated review comments by preventing already-aborted sends from spawning and by adding a SIGKILL watchdog after timeout SIGTERM, with regression tests for both paths.
